serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: Kokoro TTS API base URL (e.g. https://kokoro.samf.dev)

text.title: Text
text.default: Welcome to BruControl, I'm Bella, your personal text to speech assistant.

speak.title: Speak
speak.description: Set to true to play pre-built audio. Resets to false after playback.

voice.title: Voice
voice.description: Kokoro voice id (e.g. af_heart, af_bella, am_michael). See GET /v1/audio/voices for available voices.

responseFormat.title: Response format
responseFormat.description: Audio format: mp3, wav, opus, or flac
